principle: No signal is complete until it changes a decision, confirms a decision, or improves a decision rule.
features_verified: Decision rules are stored as first-class reusable heuristics.
Decision reviews connect saved signals to affected decisions.
Saved signals can create decision reviews and update decision rules.
Command Center shows Decision Queue and Decision Rules.
Decision feedback updates the review and strengthens or weakens the linked rule.
Export includes decision rules and decision reviews.
Loop checker verifies the Decision Intelligence Layer end to end.
